stories.title: Figma Import + Text Framing + Component Palette
acceptanceCriteria: lib/figma/import.ts exports fetchFigmaNodes(fileKey, nodeId, token) that returns parsed FigmaImportResult
lib/figma/text-framing.ts exports classifyTextSlots() using relative fontSize ranking (B+C approach) — largest=headline, 2nd=subheadline, rest=body/caption
components/panel/ComponentPalette.tsx renders brand-filtered component list with thumbnails from DB
app/api/figma/import/route.ts accepts POST {fileKey, nodeId, brandId} and creates component in DB
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Canvas Editor Core (DnD + Sections + Text Editing)
acceptanceCriteria: components/editor/Canvas.tsx accepts drops from ComponentPalette and creates CanvasSection instances
components/editor/Section.tsx renders text_slots and image_slots at correct positions using react-rnd
components/editor/TextEditor.tsx supports inline contentEditable text editing in each text slot
Sections can be reordered via drag, deleted, and resized
editor-store undo/redo works for add/remove/edit operations
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Editor Layout + Project Save/Load
acceptanceCriteria: app/editor/[projectId]/page.tsx renders 3-panel layout: ComponentPalette (left) + Canvas (center) + right panel placeholder
components/editor/Toolbar.tsx renders undo/redo/zoom controls
Save button persists canvas_state to Supabase projects table (URL references only, no base64)
Loading /editor/{id} restores full canvas state from DB
Auto-save with 3-second debounce on canvas changes
pnpm build passes

stories.title: Product Info Form + Brand Expert Agent Chat
acceptanceCriteria: components/panel/ProductInfoPanel.tsx has form fields: productName, productNameEn, mainConcept, ingredients
components/panel/AgentChatPanel.tsx renders multi-turn chat UI with message history
app/api/ai/chat/route.ts streams Gemini responses using ReadableStream
System prompt includes EVAS brand guidelines + cosmetics marketing expertise
Chat history saved to chat_histories table per project
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Agent Output Summary (Copy/USP/Mood)
acceptanceCriteria: Agent chat has 'Summarize' button that triggers structured output extraction
Extracted fields: mainCopy, tagline, usp, designMood, toneAndManner saved to project.agent_context
Summary card displays extracted fields below chat, editable inline
project-store.updateAgentContext() persists to Supabase
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: PDP Blueprint Generation (Layout-Aware)
acceptanceCriteria: lib/ai/pdp-service.ts contains buildAnalyzePrompt() ported from reference with layout constraint extensions
Blueprint generation accepts canvas text_slots info and generates text fitting each slot's maxLength/role
app/api/pdp/analyze/route.ts accepts POST with productInfo + agentContext + canvasLayout
Generated blueprint stored in project.blueprint
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Content-to-Canvas Auto-Placement
acceptanceCriteria: After blueprint generation, text content auto-fills matching canvas text slots by role (headline->headline slot, etc.)
Section-by-section content can be manually edited in canvas after auto-fill
Re-generate button per section regenerates only that section's text
Canvas isDirty flag set after auto-placement
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Image Generation Pipeline + Reference Controls
acceptanceCriteria: lib/ai/image-service.ts contains buildImagePrompt(), buildImageStyleInstructions(), identity lock loop ported from reference
components/panel/ImageGenPanel.tsx has upload areas for product/model/reference images
Reference element buttons (color, composition, pose, lighting, angle, concept, props) toggle selection
Selected elements modify prompt generation via buildReferenceElementPrompt()
app/api/pdp/images/route.ts retrieves user's gemini_api_key from profiles table
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Image Gallery + Prompt Improvement
acceptanceCriteria: components/gallery/SectionGallery.tsx shows all generated images per section as thumbnail grid
Clicking a thumbnail sets is_selected=true and deselects others for that section
Selected image appears in canvas image_slot
Prompt improvement button sends current prompt + 'improve this' instruction to Gemini
Generated images saved to Supabase Storage (generated-images bucket) and URL stored in generated_images table
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Multi-Language Translation
acceptanceCriteria: lib/ai/translation-service.ts translates all canvas text to 5 languages (en, zh, ja, vi, ru)
Translation uses en blueprint fields as base, falls back to ko
brands.protected_terms preserved as-is during translation
components/panel/TranslationPanel.tsx shows language tabs with preview per language
Translations saved to translations table per project+language
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Export (JPG + Figma Plugin)
acceptanceCriteria: JPG export renders canvas sections as images using server-side approach, downloads as ZIP with language variants
apps/figma-plugin/manifest.json and code.ts exist with valid Figma Plugin structure
Figma plugin receives canvas data via postMessage and creates Figma frames/text/image nodes
Export toolbar buttons trigger respective export flows
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Admin Dashboard (Users + API Keys + Brands)
acceptanceCriteria: app/(admin)/admin/users/page.tsx lists users with role and API key status
Admin can assign/update Gemini API key per user
Admin can change user role (admin/editor/viewer)
app/(admin)/admin/brands/page.tsx allows CRUD on brands (name, slug, color_palette, protected_terms)
Admin routes protected by role check — non-admin redirected
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Component Management (Figma Import UI)
acceptanceCriteria: app/(admin)/admin/components/page.tsx lists components per brand with thumbnails
Import form accepts Figma file URL, parses fileKey/nodeId, triggers import API
After import, admin can review and correct auto-classified text slot roles via dropdown
Admin can manually create components with JSON text_slots/image_slots definition
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors

stories.title: Polish + Deploy
acceptanceCriteria: Error boundaries and loading states on all async operations
pnpm build passes with zero warnings
pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors
Vercel deployment config exists (vercel.json or auto-detect)
CLAUDE.md updated with content Supabase project info
